mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payments (payment_id, order_id, price, user_no, status, created_at) VALUES (payments_seq.NEXTVAL, #{order_id}, #{price}, #{user_no}, 'READY', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT order_id, price, status FROM payments WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.update: UPDATE payments SET payment_key = #{payment_key}, method = #{method}, status= 'DONE', approved_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE payments SET status= 'FAIL', approved_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE payments SET status = #{status}, approved_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
